title: Umra Narayan
tagline: Umra Narayan — spiritual town of Uttarakhand

overview.short: Umra Narayan is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu.
overview.description: Umra Narayan is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu. The temple is 5–7 km from the main town of Rudraprayag in Uttarakhand, India.

topPlaces.name: Rudraprayag
topPlaces.description: Rudraprayag is a city and a municipality in Rudraprayag district in the Indian state of Uttarakhand. Rudraprayag is one of the Panch Prayag (five confluences) of Alaknanda River, the point of confluence of rivers Alaknanda and Mandakini.

topPlaces.name: Mandakini River
topPlaces.description: The Mandakini River is a tributary of the Alaknanda River in the Indian state of Uttarakhand. The river runs for approximately 81 kilometres (50 mi) between the Rudraprayag and Sonprayag areas and emerges from the Chorabari Glacier.

items.note: Rudraprayag is a city and a municipality in Rudraprayag district in the Indian state of Uttarakhand. Rudraprayag is one of the Panch Prayag (five confluences) of Alaknanda River, the point of confluence of rivers Alaknanda and Mandakini.

The Mandakini River is a tributary of the Alaknanda River in the Indian state of Uttarakhand. The river runs for approximately 81 kilometres (50 mi) between the Rudraprayag and Sonprayag areas and emerges from the Chorabari Glacier.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Umra Narayan?
faq.a: The best time to visit Umra Narayan is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Umra Narayan?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport (Jolly Grant) (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Haridwar Junction (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Umra Narayan?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Umra Narayan at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Umra Narayan?
faq.a: Stays in Umra Narayan start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Umra Narayan?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rudraprayag, Mandakini River.
